issues.title: Real Codex permission routing demo
issues.body: This is a local-only real Codex permission routing demo. Do not call GitHub. Do not post a real issue comment. Do not commit or push. Route this through Session_router to worker_A. worker_A should split the work into subagent_A1 for implementation and subagent_A2 for verification. subagent_A1 must request permission through Session_router before writing a local demo file. If permission is granted through Session_router, write `.core_program/dry_run_output/real_codex_permission_worker/permission_granted.txt` with one line: `permission granted through Session_router`. subagent_A2 should verify that file. worker_A should report the planned human-visible comment text in the session, including a codex-agent-v1 marker for this trigger fingerprint, but must not post it to GitHub.
